chapter_title.en: The Saying When the Rooster Crows

text: 1394 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «تَعَلَّمُوا مِنَ اَلْغُرَابِ ثَلاَثَ خِصَالٍ اِسْتِتَارَهُ بِالسِّفَادِ وَ بُكُورَهُ فِي طَلَبِ اَلرِّزْقِ وَ حَذَرَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1394 - Imam (as) said:
"Learn three qualities from the crow: its concealment when mating, its early rising in seeking sustenance, and its cautiousness."
